resources.string: Google Play services are unavailable.
No purchases found. Are you using the right account?
Already purchased
Google Play reports that you already own this upgrade, but it could not be restored. Check that you are signed in with the Google account used for the original purchase, then try “Restore purchase”.
Permission Pilot is ad-free and respects your privacy. Upgrading supports continued development.
Start free trial
Subscribe
%s/year, cancel anytime
One-time purchase
One-time purchase of %s
Restore purchase
No purchases found. Check that you are signed in with the correct Google account.
Already bought Pro?
It looks like you upgraded to Pro on this device before. Restore your purchase to unlock it again.
Subscriptions renew automatically. You can cancel anytime.
Pro
Permission Pilot Pro
You\'re Pro — thank you!
Your one-time Pro purchase unlocks every Pro feature, forever.
Your subscription unlocks every Pro feature.
Your subscription
Your subscription is active and renews automatically.
Your subscription is set to expire and won\'t renew. You\'ll keep Pro until it ends.
You own the one-time Pro upgrade and also have an active subscription. You don\'t need both — cancel the subscription in Google Play to avoid further charges.
Manage subscription
Lifetime Pro
You own the one-time Pro upgrade. No subscription, no renewals.
Switch to a one-time purchase
Your subscription won\'t renew, so you can move to the permanent one-time Pro purchase now.
To switch to the one-time purchase, first cancel your subscription in Google Play. This offer unlocks once it\'s set not to renew.
Google Play only checks the account you\'re currently signed in with. The one-time purchase is separate from your subscription.
Your subscription is still active and renewing. Cancel it in Google Play first.
Couldn\'t verify your subscription with Google Play. Please try again.
Confirming your purchase
Waiting for Google Play to re-confirm your Pro purchase. This usually resolves on its own.
We still can\'t re-confirm your Pro purchase with Google Play. If this keeps happening, try restoring your purchase or contact support.
Status looks wrong?
If you\'ve purchased Pro but it isn\'t showing, run a live check against Google Play.
Purchase restored.
Make sure you\'re signed in with the Google account you used to purchase. A live check against Google Play just ran.
Upgrade options
Same features, just different pricing models.
or
Yearly subscription
Renews yearly after the free trial. Cancel anytime in Google Play.
Renews yearly. Cancel anytime in Google Play.
Buy once
One payment, no renewals.
Subscription still active
Google Play was just checked, but no Pro purchase could be confirmed for the account it is using for this app.
Multiple accounts can confuse Google Play. Installing the app through the Google Play website forces it to associate with a specific account.
Google Play synchronization can take a while. Try rebooting, clearing the Google Play Store cache, or simply waiting.
Still stuck? Contact support from the email that made the purchase and include your Google Play order number.
